item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Images of Note: My internet is shit
item.description:
Give me Kronk Anakin.
Jeremy Cunt is why I fucking hate people in authority talking about shit they don't know about. http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
Do it. Do it.
When I have a moment I usually watch cab view videos or plane accident videos.
This is the best thing I have ever seen.
"AI will solve everything" The AI:
This is the gayest thing I have seen today
My mum when I was 6
Something tells me this has happened before.
I still think about flowers for Algernon.
I need to write this in all caps: MEMBERS OF THE BRITISH GOVERNMENT ARE OPENLY ADVOCATING FOR CONVERSION THERAPY FOR TRANSGENDER PEOPLE, INCLUDING A CERTAIN LESBIAN MSP! FUCK. CONVERSION. THERAPY.
HELL YEAH WOMEN 2 JUST DROPPED
As a former cashier, I wish I could've done this.
This is my favourite video ever.
I AM GOING TO COMMIT VARIOUS UNFORGIVABLE WARCRIMES
byeh
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Doing mental gymnastics to ignore poverty.
item.dc:creator: Othagovna

item.title: Dad pride post
item.description:
This is a chat between me, my eldest daughter (blue) who lives with her mother, and my wife (red)
We live 300 miles apart so the old WhatsApp chat is a good way to keep up to speed with each other
Did I handle this Ok? I’m sure she knows me well enough to know I’m a clown bastard. I don’t care who she loves so long as they treat her as she deserves <3
item.dc:creator: dundeeisdrunk

item.title: Keanu Reeves says he would love to play John Constantine again
item.dc:creator: elliot23455

item.title: Teeny tiny itty bitty octopus
item.description: So, obviously as soon as I came across this video I had to grab it to share with you all - but mostly for @TinyOctopus of course. Had to split it into three parts due to its length, but it's worth it to see the little guy giving a big ol' finger hug at the end. Enjoy! (Sauce: https://www.instagram.com/reel/C8FVzoApohT/)

item.title: Commissions are open!
item.description: https://ko-fi.com/miagabriella/commissions Little bit of shameless promo for my commissions! Opened some new commission options and keen to make some art! Done a few diff price ranges! If you have any non sfw commissions just message me privately please outside of kofi! And to all of those who love my art and can’t afford to support me I still really appreciate the love of what I do and what I post. Thanks so much for the continued support. Please don’t feel any pressure to commission just cuz u love my art!

item.title: Meme dump to get you trough Friday #249 (hang in there, weekend is coming soon)
item.description:
1. Cleva girl
2. Apparently in this sport you can kick start fighting whenever you want
3. What magic is this
4
5. Do not be like these people
6
7
8. We ve been tricked
9
10. That was the coolest thing ever
11
12
13
14
15. Thank you for making it to the end of this dump, I hope you were thoroughly entertained! I would like to share with you that I'm making a wacky game called Do Not Press The Button, and it's tone and style are kind of inspired by the Stanley Parable. Here is an inspiration quote within the game! If you liked the humor in this dump, you would probably like the game. Please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Have a happy weekend, gang!

item.title: An actual phone vid dump (misc.)
item.description:
Eggggggggggg
Dunno if Imgur works anymore but for more of Ian McConnell I just got smashed and watched his "Season 1" stand up and it gave me hope, sadness, and like if ahh n/m anyways https://youtu.be/7vV952XKJWg?si=6nCeo-ROKRtB3psv I think is the full. Also This isn't a fucking thing! It's literally me trying to store favorites off my phone on this file server... so I guess whatever but I half inched half these favorites from Lady abbatha stabbatha's dumps so leave me alone and ask her!
item.dc:creator: Baronvonjoy

item.title: Why student debt exists.
item.description:
My brother is waiting to see what happens to his student loan debt. He's really sweating it; even if only $10K was forgiven, it would lighten his load.
I admit that this is nearly a year old, but it still seems relevant to me.
(originally posted by @UncleMartha in r/NewsWithJingjing on 2023-06-29 10:59:07)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: This better not be fake news!
item.description: My heart still goes out to the families. Their hearts will be torn open again by this case, but hopefully in the end some semblance of closure on one end will be felt. It will never fill the empty void though. I just hope this case doesn’t turn into a travesty of justice.
item.dc:creator: clamjuicecoctail

item.title: Time to wave the sunset flag, I guess
item.description: This week has been an emotional rollercoaster. Had to let my partner go because I realized there was an optimal amount of interaction and degree of intimacy that I had pushed past because I knew he wanted more and I thought I had to acclimate everything. It took me a couple of tries to get used to a simple peck on the lips and I literally threw off a previous date who tried to French kiss me. But the stress of having my latest partner sleep over was the straw that broke the camel's back. Instead of feeling closer, I felt like my space was violated and I couldn't relax. It took a couple weeks but that was the beginning of the end. The next step would have been staying at his place, and unlike in my place where I have a spare mattress, I would have had to sleep in his bed. He knew I had trauma in my past and had assured me sex was not on the table unless I wanted it. But that wasn't enough. I was stressed out just by the thought of how much he would kiss and touch me without asking. I know he thought I'd consented and that I liked it. I often giggled reflexively when he did it, so of course he thought I liked it. But I'm an aspy anxiety case, I get overstimulated and react in ways that aren't appropriate to how I want the situation to go. I won't go into too much detail about my background except to say I have generalized anxiety, some autistic traits, and some trauma that made me not trust any feeling that I couldn't explain rationally. There are also some mommy issues that didn't help (most of which are more my grandmother's fault than mom's, but her blaming me for getting bullied because I didn't have enough emotional control when I was 7-9 years old was definitely still a major contributor). And I had a stalking incident in undergrad that affected me pretty bad. Between all of that (and the lack of unconditional social and emotional supports in the US in general) I ended up being a pathological people pleaser. Well, a sexologist I saw the other day gave me an epiphany: if I don't feel romantic attraction, if I don't want sex, if I'm happier and less stressed alone, and I think the odds of negative side effects are vastly higher than the odds of seeing any benefits from more medication, then why do I need treatment? Maybe it's better to just live as aro-ace regardless of whether it's inborn or induced by medicine. I can't stop the medicine that might've caused it (hereditary disease), and I have several reasons to think it *is* inborn. But, well, I have to see a shrink tomorrow for a final verdict. Hopefully I don't just fold like a lawn chair as usual.
item.dc:creator: NerdNerdburger
